tasks.subject: Task 0: Relocate postgresqlBackup to postgres module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `postgresqlBackup` actually run by moving it out of the disabled `homelab.services.backup` module into the postgres module, with dumps on Nitor.

**Files:**
- Modify: `homelab/services/postgresql/default.nix`
- Modify: `homelab/services/backup/default.nix`

**Verify:** `just check && just dry-run magic-pylon`; after deploy `ls /mnt/Nitor/Backups/postgresql/` shows dump files.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["homelab/services/postgresql/default.nix", "homelab/services/backup/default.nix"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just dry-run magic-pylon", "acceptanceCriteria": ["postgresqlBackup timers active", "dump produced in /mnt/Nitor/Backups/postgresql", "single source of truth in postgres module"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add resendApiKey agenix secret entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reference the encrypted Resend SMTP API key (already in nix-private repo) so Stalwart can read it at runtime.

**Files:**
- Modify: `machines/nixos/magic-pylon/secrets/default.nix`

**Verify:** `sudo ls -l /run/agenix/resendApiKey` on magic-pylon after deploy

```json:metadata
{"files": ["machines/nixos/magic-pylon/secrets/default.nix", "flake.lock"], "verifyCommand": "just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["agenix entry added", "flake.lock bumped to latest nix-private main", "decrypted key starts with re_"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add Stalwart NixOS service module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the `homelab.services.stalwart` module, import it, and enable it on magic-pylon.

**Files:**
- Create: `homelab/services/stalwart/default.nix`
- Modify: `homelab/services/default.nix`
- Modify: `machines/nixos/magic-pylon/homelab/default.nix`

**Verify:** `just check && just dry-run magic-pylon`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["homelab/services/stalwart/default.nix", "homelab/services/default.nix", "machines/nixos/magic-pylon/homelab/default.nix"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just dry-run magic-pylon", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flake evaluates", "dry-run shows expected activations", "no settings schema errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Deploy and bootstrap Stalwart
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply config, capture admin password, set up Tailscale-only DNS for the admin UI, log in, rotate password, create mailbox, record DKIM key.

**Files:** none

**Verify:** `ssh magic-pylon "systemctl is-active stalwart-mail"` returns `active`; admin UI login works

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "ssh magic-pylon 'systemctl is-active stalwart-mail'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service active", "admin UI reachable from Tailscale only", "user mailbox created", "DKIM key recorded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Cloudflare DNS — inbound mail records
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Publish DNS records so the public internet can find the mail server and verify SPF/DKIM/DMARC.

**Files:** none

**Verify:** dig queries for MX, A, SPF, DKIM, DMARC all return correct values

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "dig +short mx magicsk.eu && dig +short a mail.magicsk.eu && dig +short txt _dmarc.magicsk.eu", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MX, A, SPF, DKIM, DMARC records all present and queryable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Resend domain verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add magicsk.eu in Resend dashboard, copy verification records to Cloudflare, confirm verified status.

**Files:** none

**Verify:** Resend dashboard Domains page shows magicsk.eu verified

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["domain verified in Resend dashboard"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Oracle VPS — iptables port forwarding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Forward mail ports from the VPS public IP through wg0 to magic-pylon.

**Files:** none

**Verify:** `nc -vz mail.magicsk.eu 25` from off-LAN connects (after Task 7 also done)

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "nc -vz mail.magicsk.eu 25", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IP forwarding enabled persistently", "DNAT rules for 5 mail ports", "MASQUERADE rule for return path", "rules persisted across reboot"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: OCI Security List + PTR record
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Open mail ports at the cloud-firewall layer and set reverse DNS for deliverability.

**Files:** none

**Verify:** `dig -x 132.226.217.72` returns mail.magicsk.eu; `nc -vz mail.magicsk.eu 25` succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "dig -x 132.226.217.72 && nc -vz mail.magicsk.eu 25", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Security List opened", "PTR set to mail.magicsk.eu", "external port reachability"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: End-to-end deliverability verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the full system works — real send/receive, deliverability score, IMAP client configured.

**Files:** none

**Verify:** Gmail outbound passes auth, inbound arrives via IMAP, mail-tester ≥8/10, post-restart still works

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Gmail outbound passes auth", "inbound arrival via IMAP", "mail-tester >=8/10", "post-restart still works"]}
```
